nasa_apod.title: Orion over Mount Teide
nasa_apod.explanation: Orion is rarely seen like this.  To achieve this majestic vista, you need a camera capable of taking such long duration exposures that faint features in the night sky become revealed.  Iconic nebulas that appear include the Orion Nebula, the Flame Nebula, and Barnard's Loop. For contrast, it also he...
